headline: Did Goldman’s Conviction-List Call on DoorDash (DASH) Just Reframe Its Local Commerce Ambitions?
summary: In May 2026, Goldman Sachs added DoorDash to its U.S. Conviction List, citing strong platform growth, robust Marketplace Gross Order Value gains, and momentum from initiatives such as the Deliveroo integration and a new nationwide partnership with Urban Outfitters. This recognition comes as DoorDash broadens its reach beyond restaurant delivery into wider local commerce, while simultaneously refreshing its leadership with a new Chief Marketing Officer to deepen customer engagement...

headline: How The Bright Horizons (BFAM) Narrative Is Shifting With New Targets And Buybacks
summary: The updated fair value estimate for Bright Horizons Family Solutions has shifted from US$97.11 to US$92.56, alongside several Street price target trims of about US$5, US$10, and US$12 at firms such as JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs. These revisions track with analysts recalibrating their models as they rethink how much investors may be willing to pay for the stock based on revised growth expectations. As you read on, you will see how these changing targets fit into the broader analyst narrative...
